title: Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]
description: Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation.
body:
# ✨ Chat Animation * Improves chat visuals by adding smooth animations. * Optionally removes the message indicator line to the left of messages. * Configuring the mod on Fabric is possible with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
_If you like this mod you might also like [smooth-gui](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui)_
